dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c †Pant b Mohammed Shami 22 (12b 4x4 0x6 15m) SR: 183.33

dismissalComment.html: Whoa, Jaiswal's been bounced out! Wasn't sure if he hit it at first but there was glove on it. Pant jumped high and took it with the tip of his right hand. Snorter from Shami, 141ks, shortish and zipping over leg. Jaiswal swivelled, got his shoulders across to get inside the line for the hook. Ball was just over the shoulder as it rushed past the bat and took the glove

image.longCaption: Digvesh Rathi, player portrait

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Rathi b Mohsin Khan 8 (11b 2x4 0x6 23m) SR: 72.72

dismissalComment.html: Should be out. Rathi takes a great catch! Not Sooryavanshi's day, the first big hit he attempts, he's gone. It's his shot to be fair, the long hit off the front foot over long-on but the fullish length ball at 142ks rose and took the outer-half of the bat. Ball went high, two infielders were running back from cover, Rathi was on the run as he judged it well and took it around his chest. Mohsin delighted as are LSG

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c †Pant b Mohammed Shami 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Shami Test-ifies T20s to nick off Jurel. Day one, first session, angle in towards leg before swerving away late. Jurel kept his hands close but left the bat-face slightly open. The 136ks ball took the outside edge and went to Pant. Shami will be on a hat-trick at the start of his next over

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag c Pooran b Prince Yadav 20 (19b 2x4 1x6 32m) SR: 105.26

dismissalComment.html: Helicopter flies only till long-on! Parag falls cheaply again, this time to a hittable ball. Seam-up 139ks pitched up on on off. Parag got still and wristed the helicopter through and through, bat-face may have been a touch too open and he ended up getting up too much height. Pooran took the catch and threw it right up too.

dismissalText.long: c Prince Yadav b Mohsin Khan
dismissalText.commentary: Shimron Hetmyer c Prince Yadav b Mohsin Khan 22 (18b 2x4 1x6 34m) SR: 122.22

dismissalComment.html: Oh, LSG definitely on top, now. Mohsin returns and takes out Hetmyer. Back of a length ball just around off stump at 139.6kph. The angle back in troubles Hetmyer, who looks to turn this to the on-side, gets a big leading that pops straight up with Prince taking a simple enough catch at mid-off

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Rathi b Mohsin Khan 8 (11b 2x4 0x6 23m) SR: 72.72

dismissalComment.html: Should be out. Rathi takes a great catch! Not Sooryavanshi's day, the first big hit he attempts, he's gone. It's his shot to be fair, the long hit off the front foot over long-on but the fullish length ball at 142ks rose and took the outer-half of the bat. Ball went high, two infielders were running back from cover, Rathi was on the run as he judged it well and took it around his chest. Mohsin delighted as are LSG

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Badoni run out (sub [Ravi Singh]) 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 4m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Badoni gone by the sub-fielder! Sent upstairs, looked out. Yeah, Badoni not even in the frame as Ravi ran in from midwicket and under-armed it at the striker's. Was a length ball on leg, Badoni looked to defend it straight. Ball went off the inside edge to the leg side. Badoni ran half-way on the edge of the off-side of the pitch, Marsh was on the other side signaling 'there's no run there'. Badoni went back, Ravi came in and threw it from the short-leg area
